```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
set.seed(sample.int(.Machine$integer.max, 1))

mu     <- sample(2:8, 1)
sigma2 <- sample(c(1, 4, 9), 1)
n      <- sample(c(25, 36, 64, 100), 1)

# g(mu, sigma2) = mu / sigma = mu / sqrt(sigma2)
# nabla g = (1/sigma, -mu/(2*sigma^3)) = (1/sqrt(sigma2), -mu/(2*sigma2^(3/2)))
# I^{-1} = diag(sigma2, 2*sigma2^2)
# Var assint de sqrt(n)*g_hat = nabla g^T I^{-1} nabla g
# = sigma2 * (1/sigma2) + 2*sigma2^2 * (mu/(2*sigma2^(3/2)))^2
# = 1 + 2*sigma2^2 * mu^2/(4*sigma2^3)
# = 1 + mu^2/(2*sigma2)

correct <- round(1 + mu^2 / (2 * sigma2), 4)
w1      <- round(1 + mu^2 / sigma2, 4)
w2      <- round(sigma2 + mu^2 / (2 * sigma2), 4)
w3      <- round(abs(1 - mu^2 / (2 * sigma2)), 4)
w4      <- round(mu^2 / (2 * sigma2), 4)

all_vals <- c(correct, w1, w2, w3, w4)

# Garante cinco alternativas numericamente distintas após a parametrização.
integer_choices <- all(abs(all_vals - round(all_vals)) < sqrt(.Machine$double.eps))
choice_step <- if (integer_choices) 1 else max(1e-4, max(abs(all_vals), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.01)
while (anyDuplicated(all_vals)) {
  duplicate_position <- which(duplicated(all_vals))[1]
  all_vals[duplicate_position] <- max(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE) + choice_step
}
choices <- sample(all_vals)
sol_pos <- which(choices == correct)
sol_str <- paste(as.integer(seq_along(choices) == sol_pos), collapse = "")
```

Question
========
Para $X_i \overset{\text{iid}}{\sim} N(\mu, \sigma^2)$, seja $g(\mu, \sigma^2) = \mu/\sigma$ (coeficiente de variação inverso).

Pelo **Método Delta Multivariado**, a variância assintótica de $\sqrt{n}\,\hat{g}_{MV}$ é $\nabla g^\top I^{-1} \nabla g$, onde:
- $\nabla g = (1/\sigma,\; -\mu/(2\sigma^3))^\top$
- $I^{-1} = \text{diag}(\sigma^2,\; 2\sigma^4)$

**Cálculo:** o primeiro termo contribui $\sigma^2 \cdot (1/\sigma)^2 = 1$; o segundo contribui $2\sigma^4 \cdot (\mu/(2\sigma^3))^2 = \mu^2/(2\sigma^2)$.

Com $\mu = `r mu`$ e $\sigma^2 = `r sigma2`$, qual é a variância assintótica de $\sqrt{n}\,\hat{g}_{MV}$?

Answerlist
----------
* `r choices[1]`
* `r choices[2]`
* `r choices[3]`
* `r choices[4]`
* `r choices[5]`

Solution
========
Aplicando o Método Delta Multivariado:
$$\text{Var}_{\text{assint}}(\sqrt{n}\,\hat{g}_{MV}) = \nabla g^\top I^{-1} \nabla g = 1 + \frac{\mu^2}{2\sigma^2}.$$

Substituindo $\mu = `r mu`$ e $\sigma^2 = `r sigma2`$:
$$1 + \frac{`r mu`^2}{2 \times `r sigma2`} = 1 + \frac{`r mu^2`}{`r 2*sigma2`} = `r correct`.$$

A variância assintótica de $\hat{g}_{MV}$ (sem o fator $n$) seria $(`r correct`)/n$.

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap7S1Q9_delta_cv_normal
extype: schoice
exsolution: `r sol_str`
exshuffle: FALSE
